title: SWD T20 knock-out competition kicks off
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The 2025/26 local leagues competition of SWD Cricket will kick off on Saturday with the T20 knockout competition.","html":"OUDTSHOORN NEWS - The 2025/26 local leagues competition of SWD Cricket will kick off on Saturday with the T20 knockout competition."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The pool matches will be contested for the next two weekends. The respective pool winners will advance to the quarter finals on 27 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The semi-finals will be played on 4 October, and the final is scheduled to be played on 4 October at the REC Ground.","html":"The semi-finals will be played on 4 October, and the final is scheduled to be played on 4 October at the REC Ground."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United has won the title for the past two seasons.","html":"Pacaltsdorp United has won the title for the past two seasons."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The fixtures for the weekend are","html":"The fixtures for the weekend are"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Saturday 13 September","html":"Saturday 13 September"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pool A:","html":"Pool A:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mossel Bay vs Dysselsdorp CC;","html":"Mossel Bay vs Dysselsdorp CC;"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Union Stars I vs Calitzdorp Young Stars CC;","html":"Union Stars I
